text:
is a Scout Regiment soldier.

Appearance

Eld has brown eyes and blond hair tied in a bun. He wears the Scout Regiment uniform.

Story

When Commander Erwin Smith tries to fit in with his subordinates, he first approaches Gunther and Eld who are taking care of the horses. He begins to make jokes, but the two soldiers are confused. Later, Erwin comes back after a makeover, but they remain uneasy.
